title: Intense Alsatian Salt Cod Tarte Tatin
description: A spicy, crisp vegan tartatin with salt cod, caramelized sugar, and a clafoutis-style batter baked in an earthenware bowl.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180C and place an earthenware bowl inside to heat.
Pat the rehydrated cod dry, season with sea salt, smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, and lemon juice, then set aside.
In a small saucepan, heat sugar and olive oil until syrup turns golden, then carefully pour into the preheated bowl.
Place the seasoned cod fillets on top of the caramel, arranging them evenly.
Whisk oat milk with flour, tapioca starch and baking powder until smooth, then pour the batter over the cod, ensuring it covers the fish.
Bake in the oven for 25 minutes until the batter sets and the edges are golden.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes, then carefully flip the bowl onto a serving plate to reveal the caramelized top.
Serve warm, optionally garnished with fresh thyme.
Enjoy a spicy, crisp Alsatian-inspired vegan tarte tatin.
